title: activity — retention windows
description: Tier-based retention. Hard-delete past the tier window — activity is product UX, not evidence.

purge.action: immediate hard delete via FK cascade
replace causer_id + description with anonymised placeholders. Row retained for workspace audit trail continuity.

tier_assignment.description: retention_tier column value set at row creation by HasActivityLog. Precedence: #[LoggableActivity(retention=...)] on the model overrides workspace plan default.
